sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the blue shape again
predict(expect_change=True, note='Click on blue shape again')
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': 48}])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("=== Left blocks after clicking blue again ===")
for r in range(18, 44):
    line = ascii_lines[r][7:22]
    if any(c not in 'c' for c in line):
        print(f"  {r}: {line}")

print(f"\n  Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Let me also check the right panel
print("\n=== Right panel ===")
for r in range(33, 40):
    print(f"  {r}: {ascii_lines[r][40:57]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
